ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample associated with the host */,
  "host" TEXT /* Name of the host organism */,
  "host_age" TEXT /* Age of the host */,
  "host_description" TEXT /* Description of the host */,
  "host_disease" TEXT /* Disease the host is affected by */,
  "host_disease_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the host's disease */,
  "host_disease_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the host's disease */,
  "host_health_state" TEXT /* Health state of the host */,
  "host_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the host */,
  "host_species" TEXT /* Species of the host organism */,
  "host_breed" TEXT /* Breed of the host organism, if applicable (e.g., for animals) */,
  "host_genotype" TEXT /* Genotype information of the host */,
  "host_phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype information of the host */,
  "host_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the host was found (e.g., urban, rural, laboratory) */,
  "host_habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the host (e.g., forest, ocean) */,
  "host_diet" TEXT /* Diet of the host, if applicable */,
  "host_behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the host, if applicable */,
  "host_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the host */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the host record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the host record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identification_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identification method */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample associated with the method */,
  "identification_method" TEXT /* Method used to identify the sample */,
  "type_material" TEXT /* Type material information */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of identification method (e.g., PCR, sequencing, microscopy) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the identification method */,
  "method_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the identification method */,
  "method_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the identification method */,
  "method_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the identification process */,
  "method_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the identification method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the identification method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the identification method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "researcher_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "researcher_department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the researcher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy" (
  "ncbi_taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* NCBI taxonomy ID for the organism */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the organism */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the organism */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the organism */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the organism */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the organism */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the taxonomy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the taxonomy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ncbi_taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
